name: Riteway Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: GO Riteway Transportation Group (Riteway Bus Service, Inc.) - Bast family (parent); Cardinal Buses is the Middlebury, IN subsidiary
principals: Bast family (founders Roland 'Rollie' and Pearl Bast, 1957); Matt Shoup and Dan Shoup (legacy Cardinal Buses owners pre-2019)
service_types: school bus, motorcoach, minicoach, shuttle, private car, charter/group travel
districts_or_customers: ~38-40+ school districts across WI/IN/MI (incl. Germantown, plus Indiana districts via Cardinal); 500+ corporate clients
recent_news: GO Riteway (Oak Creek, WI) acquired Cardinal Buses of Middlebury, IN in 2019, creating one of the largest diversified Midwest fleets; Bridgewood Advisors advised GO Riteway.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. The Middlebury, IN address belongs to Cardinal Buses, already acquired by GO Riteway Transportation Group in 2019. GO Riteway is itself a major family-owned (Bast family, 4th gen) regional platform with ~1,475 employees and 1,250 vehicles - a competitor/peer to Summit at scale, not a tuck-in.

name: Diamond State Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Sister company of Douglas Companies, Inc. (Conway, AR-based tobacco/candy distributor, founded 1973)
principals: Douglas family (Douglas Companies ownership); affiliated Diamond State LLC
service_types: school bus DEALERSHIP / sales & service (IC Bus dealer for Arkansas; Trans Tech dealer for AR/MO) - NOT an operator
districts_or_customers: Sells/services buses to AR school districts and commercial customers; not a transportation contractor
recent_news: Diamond State LLC (sister to Douglas Cos.) purchased 17.5 acres of IC Bus property in Conway for $1.8M (per Arkansas Business). Operates as IC Bus & Trans Tech dealer.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFY. Diamond State is a school bus DEALERSHIP (IC Bus / International / Trans Tech sales & parts), not a student-transportation contractor. Sister company to Douglas Companies (tobacco/candy distributor). Wrong business model for Summit.

name: Lakeland Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Likely a misattributed record - Barrett, MN address and Floyd Palmer name match Palmer Bus Service, Inc.; the 'Lakelandbus.com' domain actually belongs to Lakeland Bus Lines (Dover, NJ - a separate motorcoach/tour company)
principals: Floyd Palmer (founder, 1974); transferred 2012 to daughters Hollie Johnson and Jenna Fromm (Palmer Bus Service)
districts_or_customers: West Central Area Schools (ISD 2342) - Kensington, Hoffman, Barrett, Elbow Lake, Wendell, MN - approx. 530 students transported daily at the Barrett site
recent_news: Palmer Bus Service (the entity actually at this Barrett, MN address) transferred from Floyd & Lois Palmer to daughters Hollie Johnson and Jenna Fromm in 2012; multi-site MN family operator since 1974.
fit_notes: Record appears to be a data-quality error: 'Lakeland Bus Svc Inc / WI' with Barrett, MN address and Floyd Palmer as exec maps to Palmer Bus Service (multi-site MN family operator). Palmer is a legitimate 2nd-gen family-owned MN platform - already daughter-run, succession less acute. Worth investigating Palmer Bus Service as a separate target record, but this specific row is unreliable.

name: B-J School Buses Inc
service_types: school bus (private passenger carrier, intrastate + interstate non-business)
districts_or_customers: Rural NE/SD school routes around Crofton, NE and Scotland, SD (Knox County NE / Bon Homme County SD area); specific district contracts not publicly disclosed
recent_news: USDOT 339698 ACTIVE with Satisfactory safety rating (last reviewed May 2009); 35 power units, 39 drivers, 203,000 annual miles (2025). No M&A news found.
fit_notes: Small independent rural operator (~35 buses) spanning NE/SD border with second office in Scotland, SD. Right profile for a tuck-in but small scale and limited public info; need direct outreach to John Merkel to gauge succession/sale interest. Out of footprint for most Summit core states but valid family-owned operator.

name: Jupiter School Bus Svc
service_types: school bus / charter & recreational bus leasing (intrastate non-hazmat, private passenger non-business per USDOT)
districts_or_customers: Palm Beach County area (Riviera Beach / West Palm Beach / Jupiter, FL); appears charter-oriented (private schools, camps, group transport) rather than holding a Palm Beach County School District contract
recent_news: USDOT 926853 ACTIVE but registration data flagged 'outdated' (last update March 2012); 4 power units, 1 driver per FMCSA. Founded 1997 by Danny Dempsaco.
website: unknown (no confirmed corporate URL found; not listed in original record)
fit_notes: Very small Palm Beach County operator (FMCSA shows only 4 power units / 1 driver - inconsistent with the $10.5M revenue estimate in source data, which likely overstates). Long-tenured owner (Danny Dempsaco since 1997) suggests succession potential but scale is sub-tuck-in. FL is an expansion state for Summit but this asset is too small to move the needle on its own.
